description: Configuration for RPC regression testing (same-architecture comparison)

comments.defaultTolerance: Default tolerance in percentage for numeric comparisons (0.001 = 0.001%)
comments.methodTolerances: Method-specific tolerances override the default. Balance methods use 0.1% for demurrage drift. Precision tests use 0.001% because they compare static/raw values that should be exact.
comments.normalizeFields: Fields to remove before comparison. Includes dynamic data (timestamp, blockNumber, lastUpdatedAt) and pagination metadata (hasMore, nextCursor) that inherently differ between systems.
comments.expectedFailures: Tests that are expected to fail. These won't count as regression failures.
comments.expectedFailureReasons: Reasons why each test is expected to fail - helps understand which failures are acceptable
comments.subscriptionTest: Optional WebSocket subscription testing. Exits when minEvents are received OR duration seconds elapse (whichever comes first). filterAddress=null receives ALL events (recommended). Set enabled=true to test real-time subscriptions (Env A endpoint only).
